## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Datagrid's narrative, industry trends, and AI capabilities with Thiago da Costa.](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AI adoption is shifting from search/summarize to executing complex, draining tasks](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [New workforce entrants are "AI native," giving them an advantage in leveraging AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Datagrid's AI aims to anticipate user needs, going beyond simple task completion to deliver comprehensive solutions](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [AI should be used as a proactive colleague rather than just an autocomplete tool](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Topics

### AI Adoption Trends

  - [Initial AI use cases focused on search and summarization](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Current shift towards automating complex, tedious tasks people dislike](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Example: Analyzing 1,700-page PDFs to extract specific information](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Gap between finding information and executing tasks is closing](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Prediction: AI will first replace tasks people hate doing, not entire roles](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### AI Proficiency and Workforce Dynamics

  - [Recent graduates and those learning AI now have an advantage](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Experienced workers struggle to infuse their expertise with AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [Mastering AI could become a valuable career skill](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Comparison to early internet adoption: those who mastered it gained significant advantages](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### Datagrid's AI Approach

  - [Focus on anticipating user needs and completing multi-step processes](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Example: Filing specific document sections into SharePoint without manual steps](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [AI should understand the final objective and work towards it proactively](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Enhances user output, e.g., improving LinkedIn bios or creating detailed HubSpot deals](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

### AI as a Collaborative Tool

  - [Shift from using AI as autocomplete to treating it as a colleague](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [AI can provide comprehensive insights and prepare users for meetings](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Example: Analyzing calendar events and providing detailed background on attendees](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Datagrid pioneering workflows that go beyond simple Q\&A interactions](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1807.0)

## Next Steps

  - Rafid to follow up with any additional questions via the Distribute channel
  - [Mara to send meeting transcript to Thiago for further AI analysis](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1884.0)
  - [Thiago to continue refining AI agent for LinkedIn post writing](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Team to consider how to educate users on leveraging AI as a proactive colleague](https://fathom.video/share/FbJXLGtyaRa22Wx7nFYkfG_ETSYfnV49?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
